dealSummary: Atlanta-based Stord, an ecommerce fulfillment specialist, raised a $250 million Series F at a $3 billion valuation from investors including Kleiner Perkins, Lux and Founders Fund.
New York-based OpenRouter, which offers an AI models marketplace, raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG and backed by investors including NVentures, MongoDB Ventures and Andreessen Horowitz.
leadInvestors: CapitalG, backed by investors including NVentures, MongoDB Ventures, Andreessen Horowitz

dealSummary: Phytolon, an Israel-based developer of food dye alternatives, secured $23.6 million from investors including Colorcon Ventures and Millennium Foodtech.

Connecticut-based P2 Science, which designs and manufactures renewable ingredients for consumer goods, raised $23 million in new funding led by Sofinnova Partners and backed by investors including Emerald Technology Ventures and Elm Street Ventures.
leadInvestors: Sofinnova Partners, backed by investors including Emerald Technology Ventures, Elm Street Ventures

dealSummary: Arizona-based V4c.ai, an AI data and services startup, raised new funding from Databricks Ventures and Tquila. Paris-based preventive health startup Lucis secured a $20 million Series A led by Singular.
AllO, a Munich-based developer of a restaurant operating system, raised a $14 million Series A led by Zigg Capital, Tech Funding News reported.
leadInvestors: Zigg Capital, Tech Funding News reported

dealSummary: Quanscient, a Finnish multiphysics simulation software provider, secured a €10 million Series A led by 55 North and B&C Group.
